ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches or centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds or kilograms */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Player's batting side (left, right, both) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Player's throwing side (left, right) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player (if applicable) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Player's agent or representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handles */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (regular or postseason) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Most Valuable Player (MVP) of the season */,
  "rookie_of_the_year_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Rookie of the Year of the season */,
  "cy_young_winner_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Cy Young Award winner of the season */,
  "home_run_leader_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home run leader of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_cy_young_winner_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("cy_young_winner_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_home_run_leader_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_run_leader_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_rookie_of_the_year_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("rookie_of_the_year_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the home plate umpire */,
  "winning_pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning pitcher */,
  "losing_pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing pitcher */,
  "save_pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher who recorded the save (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_winning_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_save_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("save_pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_losing_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles hit */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples hit */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Total plate appearances */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of times hit by a pitch */,
  "sacrifice_bunts" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice bunts */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "intentional_walks" INTEGER /* Number of intentional walks */,
  "ground_into_double_plays" INTEGER /* Number of times grounded into double plays */,
  "ground_into_triple_plays" INTEGER /* Number of times grounded into triple plays */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases */,
  "extra_base_hits" INTEGER /* Number of extra base hits */,
  "triple_play" INTEGER /* Number of triple plays (rare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitching statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_pitched" INTEGER /* Number of games pitched */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average (ERA) */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "holds" INTEGER /* Number of holds */,
  "blown_saves" INTEGER /* Number of blown saves */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "complete_games" INTEGER /* Number of complete games */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts */,
  "hits_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of hits allowed */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed */,
  "home_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of home runs allowed */,
  "batters_faced" INTEGER /* Number of batters faced */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Number of wild pitches */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Number of balks */,
  "pitches_thrown" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fielding statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started at the position */,
  "double_plays_turned" INTEGER /* Number of double plays turned */,
  "triple_plays_turned" INTEGER /* Number of triple plays turned */,
  "passed_balls" INTEGER /* Number of passed balls (for catchers) */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing (for catchers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury in days */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to recover */,
  "injured_list" TEXT /* Whether the player is on the injured list */,
  "doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor treating the injury */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "rehabilitation_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
